content: Proofpoint is saying your IP is blocked. I encourage following their links to identify how to unblock this. or work with your email provider. Thunderbird sends mail from your IP address, but Thunderbird cannot change it.
creator: davidsk

content: How do I follow Proofpoints links to identify how to unblock the email? Thunderbird is my email provider. Thank you.
creator: accounts66

content: NO. Thunderbird is only your email client, your assistant. Your email provider is the one who authorizes the account, the password, the storage for messages. This is often the name to the right of the @ sign in an email address, but not always. It is NEVER thunderbirdd.
creator: davidsk

content: If this is an IMAP account, thunderbird is just sync'ing to the PC. You can adjust that at the 'synchronization&storage pane for that account but changing the sync to just 30 days.
creator: davidsk

content: On the main mail screen in the L. column, R. click the account (just above the Inbox) > Subscribe > uncheck All Mail

To get assistance, I suggest posting a screenshot of the SMTP server settings pane so that people on forum can read it. Thank you.

content: This is a limit from your email provider. A mailing list won't fix it. You might try using the mailmerge addon, as it sends multiple messages. If this is done frequently, you might consider a mailing service, such as Mailchimp (which is free for small lists).
creator: davidsk

content:
Sei indietro di parecchie versioni, ma potrebbe non essere quello il problema.

Per poter inquadrare il problema prova a fornire queste informazioni:

  1. Versione di Thunderbird
  2. Versione del sistema operativo
  3. Provider delle caselle email (Gmail, Libero, Hotmail, etc.)
  4. Tipologia di account (POP3, IMAP)
  5. Estensioni installate
  6. Messaggi di errore che vengono visualizzati durante l'utilizzo di Thunderbird
  7. Software di sicurezza eventualmente presenti (Antivirus e simili)
  8. Screenshot del problema (se utile a chiarire il contesto)
creator: @next

content: Het lijkt er op dat de Chinese muur er tussen zit. Indien u geëncrypte e-mailberichten ontvangt zult u afspraken (sleutels) moeten maken met de afzender om die weer te decrypten (ontsleutelen). Meer info daarover staat in https://support.mozilla.org/nl/kb/openpgp-thunderbird-howto-en-faq.
creator: Mozilla-assistent

content: Gmail blokkeert e-mailberichten vanaf het (oude)kabelfoon.nl-domein. Volgens mij is dat overgenomen door Caiway. Probeer daarom eens de instellingen van Caiway te gebruiken voor het versturen van berichten: https://www.caiway.nl/klantenservice/internet-en-wifi/e-mail/caiway-serverinstellingen.
creator: Mozilla-assistent

content:
Ciao,

puoi fornirci maggiori dettagli sul problema riscontrato? Senza ulteriori dettagli, non possiamo fare molto per aiutarti.

Quando pubblichi domande, è utile includere informazioni come il sistema operativo, la versione del browser, messaggi di errore specifici e i passaggi che hai seguito per cercare di risolvere il problema. Questo tipo di contesto consente ai membri della comunità di fornire una soluzione più accurata ed efficace.

Restiamo in attesa dei tuoi aggiornamenti!
creator: @next

content: Thunderbird does not automatically capitalize anything. My guess is that you may be using an addon. Thunderbird does flag possible punctuation errors, but does not automatically correct them.
creator: davidsk

content: Do you want to say that when you type du Thunderbird's spellchecker capitalises it to Du ? Which German dictionary (deutsches Wörterbuch) did you install in Add-ons Manager > Dictionaries in your Thunderbird? I am using the "German Dictionary 2.1" and cannot reproduce your issue. Did you install "Grammatik- und Rechtschreibprüfung - LanguageTool" from this page https://addons.thunderbird.net/de/thunderbird/addon/grammar-and-spell-checker/ ?
creator: Mapenzi
